rationale: Previous attempt asserted the ensures clauses unconditionally, but those are inside the antecedent of an `==>` in the proof fn's ensures, so they are not free hypotheses — hence the assertion failures. The fix gates the bridging assertions behind an `if (antecedent)`, restating the antecedent so its conjuncts become hypotheses inside the block, and unfolds the `abstractify_...` spec fn so the two ensures-forms are syntactically the same to z3.
